title: Cool Rain Reforged
description: Creates ambient sounds for certain blocks during rain
body:
This mod adds dynamic sounds to blocks during rain fall. It currently supports sounds for the following: - Rain on glass - Rain on water - Rain on lava / magma - Rain on foliage - Rain on metal blocks - Rain on wool The sounds will change i volume depending on how far you are from the blocks, and the sounds will change dependant on the blocks surrounding you.
**THIS VERSION HAS SUPPORT FOR FORGE TAGS, I CAN ADD MORE TAGS IF SUGGESTED**
****
This is a port of the [Fabric](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cool-rain) version by [JaizYT](https://www.curseforge.com/members/jaizyt/projects) with his permission: ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_f3204cbf-09ab-4c7a-a343-63c2a2f563d3.png) If you'd like to support me and the development of my mods, I recommend trying out BisectHosting.
